p.em: Standard WAL Implementation - Intel Manual Quality Specification
All multi-byte fields are stored in Little-Endian format

div.p: Chain pointer to last txn record.

ol.li: LSN > 0: Zero is reserved as INVALID_LSN.

type ∈ {1..6}:
1: BEGIN, 2: UPDATE, 3: COMMIT
4: ABORT, 5: CLR, 6: CHECKPOINT
prev_lsn: Points to the previous record LSN in the same transaction. 0 if head.

text.tspan: LogRecordHeader must be exactly 28 bytes for disk compatibility
LogRecordHeader must be exactly 28 bytes for disk compatibility
